truthAudit.Summary: Run 1 identified 7 of the 20 ground-truth vulnerabilities, correctly quoting code evidence for each. It missed 13 vulnerabilities. All findings in Run 1 were grounded in the source code with no false positives, though some were classified with incorrect CWE or severity compared to the ground truth. Additional valid issues were reported outside the ground-truth scope.

Items.Notes: Run 1 explicitly identified the format string vulnerability in debug logging, matching the exact code anchor and CWE-134 classification.
Run 1 did not identify the integer overflow in the factorial computation loop.
Run 1 did not identify the use-after-free risk in the deferred memory pool cleanup and scratch allocation.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote:
std::string command = validator_cmd + " " + config_file;
    int result = system(command.c_str());
Items.Notes: Run 1 explicitly identified command injection via config validation, matching the exact code anchor and CWE-78 classification.
Run 1 explicitly identified the stack buffer overflow in expression evaluation, matching the exact code anchor and CWE-120 classification.
Run 1 explicitly identified the race condition in the thread-safe counter, matching the exact code anchor and CWE-362 classification.
Run 1 did not identify the logic bomb bypass in the authentication routine.
Run 1 did not identify the path traversal risk in configuration loading.
Run 1 explicitly identified the heap buffer overflow in the expression parser, matching the exact code anchor and CWE-120 classification.
Run 1 explicitly identified the hardcoded administrative credentials, matching the exact code anchor and CWE-798 classification.
Run 1 did not identify the weak PRNG usage for session tokens.
Run 1 identified the non-thread-safe localtime usage but misclassified the CWE as CWE-479 instead of CWE-362, and did not explicitly quote the static cache declaration.
Run 1 did not identify the insecure temporary file handling in the audit override routine.
Run 1 did not identify the persistent authentication state issue.
Run 1 did not identify the unhandled exception risk in variable parsing.
Run 1 did not identify the integer underflow in the memory pool block split logic.
Run 1 did not identify the unbounded recursion risk in the expression parser.
Run 1 did not identify the data race in the result cache.
Run 1 did not identify the TOCTOU vulnerability in configuration loading.
Run 1 did not identify the integer division by zero in command routing.
